title: Disconnecting E-mail from E-mail and Activities
excerpt: We started using the E-mails and Activities in my company accounts but I’m trying to disconnect a E-mail from the automation, but everytime we Update the page, the check-box gets marked again. Do you have any solutions f…

posts.author: Thulio.ferreira (Thulio)
posts.cookedHtml:
We started using the E-mails and Activities in my company accounts but I’m trying to disconnect a E-mail from the automation, but everytime we Update the page, the check-box gets marked again. Do you have any solutions for that?
